ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time when the game occurred */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the game started */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the game took place */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the game (scheduled, in progress, completed, canceled) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee assigned to the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "injuries" TEXT /* Records any injuries that occurred during the game */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards issued */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards issued */,
  "audience_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the audience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the venue */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the venue */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the venue */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the venue */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available at the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's statistics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total number of goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points based on wins, losses, and ties */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of games where the team did not concede any goals */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "attendance_count" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the game */,
  "online_viewers" INTEGER /* Number of online viewers */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of attendees */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of attendees */,
  "satisfaction_score" REAL /* Satisfaction score of attendees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_attendance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, team manager, league admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., favorite teams, notification settings) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Date and time when the game occurred
Reference to the location where the game took place
Status of the game (scheduled, in progress, completed, canceled)
Reference to the referee assigned to the game
Indicates if the game went into overtime
Records any injuries that occurred during the game

Total number of goals conceded by the team

Total number of yellow cards received
